arts.ttl: 'Key factor': Fabrizio Romano shares what Tottenham have now done after agreeing fee for Mathys Tel with Bayern
'Amazing': Ben Davies says Spurs have a brilliant youngster who's 'worked so hard' to get to where he is now
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur may have had their fair share of issues this season but Thursday night shone a light on the bright future in store at...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou says Tottenham's win over Elfsborg underlined three-word message... but under-fire Spurs boss provides concerning update after his side suffered another injury
arts.sum: Spurs knew a draw would likely secure a top-eight berth, but Postecoglou watched two unlikely figures come off the bench and earn all three points.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports pundit shares what Harry Kane has now told him about Mathys Tel amid Tottenham talks for Bayern star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently in pursuit of Bayern Munich star Mathys Tel as Ange Postecoglou looks to bolster his attacking ranks. TBR Football sources understand that...

arts.ttl: Attacker offered to Tottenham expected to pass medical, claims doctor
arts.sum: Injury expert Dr Rajpal Brar believes AC Milan’s versatile winger Noah Okafor will have no problem passing his medical for Spurs if the move is to materialise. Spurs have been linked with several players this transfer window and among them is the Swiss attacker, who they have been linked with previously as well. It was […] The post Attacker offered to Tottenham expected to pass medical, claims doctor appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Man Utd, Tottenham and Rangers into Europa League last 16
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly returned to Arsenal on loan from Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevksi delivers verdict on Daniel Levy chant and why Ange Postecoglou is the right man
arts.sum: Kulusevski was asked plenty of questions ahead of the game including about Ange Postecoglou's future, the lack of transfers this month, Lucas Bergvall's form and that chant from the Spurs fans that contains both his and the Tottenham chairman Daniel Levy's name. This is an important game and if we win we go to the next round so I think we can do good things in these last four months.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou’s verdict: “A night made in Tottenham”
arts.sum: It’s a great night for the club and all credit to all the Academy and the people who have worked with them. We tried to manage our players tonight knowing the week we’ve got coming up and that’s why we left him off for the first half.

arts.ttl: 'Spurs don't need to buy anyone - just play the kids'
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou says the 3-0 Europa League win over Elfsborg was "made in Tottenham" as youngsters Dane Scarlett, Damola Ajayi and Mikey Moore all score.

arts.ttl: Mikey Moore breaks 68-year-old record as Ange Postecoglou delivers Radu Dragusin injury update
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's Mikey Moore breaks an all-time English goalscoring record held by Jimmy Greaves in Spurs' 3-0 Europa League win over Elfsborg.
